zh.lifeSummary: 當Joanne Ormsby於1623年出生在英國林可爾史爾德列索普 哥吉拉 沙智時，她的父親Richard Ormsby21歲，母親Mary Margaret Masterson20歲。她於1642年與John Smyth在美國緬因州約克薩可結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1687年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普洛文斯 本 曼恩約克享年64歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州劍橋大學默里 倫敦笛卡爾 萊麥克老鴨 利維 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joanne Ormsby于1623年出生在英国林可爾史爾德列索普 哥吉拉 沙智时，她的父亲Richard Ormsby21岁，母亲Mary Margaret Masterson20岁。她于1642年与John Smyth在美国缅因州約克薩可结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1687年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普洛文斯 本 曼恩約克享年64岁，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦笛卡爾 萊麥克老鴨 利維 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Ormsby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from North and South Ormsby (Lincolnshire), or either of two places called Ormesby in Norfolk and the North Yorkshire. The placenames all derive from the Old Norse personal name Ormr + Old Norse bȳ ‘farmstead, village’. This surname is also common in Ireland (Connacht), where it has been established since the late 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Joanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joann
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.
New London County was one of four original counties in Connecticut that were established on May 10, 1666

en.lifeSummary: When Joanne Ormsby was born in 1623, in Theddlethorpe All Saints, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Richard Ormsby, was 21 and her mother, Mary Margaret Masterson, was 20. She married John Smyth in 1642, in Saco, York, Maine, United States. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died in 1687, in York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America, at the age of 64, and was buried in Duck River Cemetery, Old Lyme, New London, Connecticut, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joanne Ormsby est née en 1623, à Theddlethorpe All Saints, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Ormsby, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Mary Margaret Masterson, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé John Smyth en 1642, à Saco, York, Maine, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1687, à York, Province of Maine, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à Duck River Cemetery, Old Lyme, New London, Connecticut, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joanne Ormsby 1623 in Theddlethorpe All Saints, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Ormsby 21 und ihre Mutter Mary Margaret Masterson 20. Sie hat 1642 in Saco, York, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten John Smyth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1687 im Alter von 64 Jahren in York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America und wurde in Duck River Cemetery, Old Lyme, New London, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joanne Ormsby è nata il nel 1623 nel Theddlethorpe All Saints, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Richard Ormsby, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Mary Margaret Masterson, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato John Smyth nel 1642, nel Saco, York, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel 1687, nel York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolta a Duck River Cemetery, Old Lyme, New London, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Joanne Ormsbyが1623年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスエッドレソルペ アル サインツで生まれた時，父Richard Ormsbyは21歳，母Mary Margaret Mastersonは20歳であった。1642年にアメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークサコでJohn Smythと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1687年にイギリス植民地アメリカプロヴィンス オフ メインヨークで64歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ニュー ロンドンオルド リメダック リバー セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joanne Ormsby(이)가 1623년 영국 링코실르 테들레소 앨 세인츠에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Ormsby(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Margaret Masterson(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1642년 미국 메인 주 요르크 사코에서 John Smyth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1687년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 프로빈스 프 맹 요르크에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 드 림 드c크 라이버 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joanne Ormsby nasceu em 1623, em Theddlethorpe All Saints, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Ormsby, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Mary Margaret Masterson, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com John Smyth em 1642, em Saco, York, Maine, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1687, em York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America, com 64 anos, e foi sepultada em Duck River Cemetery, Old Lyme, New London, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joanne Ormsby родилась в 1623 г. в местности теддлетаурп алл сеинц, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Ormsby было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Mary Margaret Masterson, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Smyth в 1642 г. в местности сако, ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1687 г. в местности ерк, провинц оф меин, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности дукк ривир кеметири, олд лим, ню лондон, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joanne Ormsby nació en 1623, en Theddlethorpe All Saints, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Ormsby, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Mary Margaret Masterson, tenía 20 años. Se casó con John Smyth en 1642, en Saco, York, Maine, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en 1687, en York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultada en Duck River Cemetery, Old Lyme, New London, Connecticut, Estados Unidos.
